{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133116C27F50AC4FAED9F5781D"}"},"total":32},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615943100871820056","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"以男主温流月视角展开，将“傀儡成人再成傀儡”的宿命感拉满。奴隶出身的他天赋异禀，被拥有无限重生能力的疯批女帝宋轻尘一眼看中，两人在一次次重生中绑定羁绊。剧情慢热却张力十足，既有权谋军事的硬核线，又有女帝毫无保留的偏爱与男主心甘情愿的效忠，疯批与清冷美人的设定极具反差感，很适合喜欢强强、宿命感和女强男强的读者。","text_exts":[{"e":47,"s":43,"text":"无限重生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%97%A0%E9%99%90%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774071076D9F5781D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615943100871820056%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227545801469945973784%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%97%A0%E9%99%90%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773227906,"group_id":"7545801469945973784","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"确实需要认真构思……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw+Nl7cgKM7dLXisPQyQi7mvBCVe0nwrVAIe6gjvyk9r","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/656216e59b3b4b1fbb1551a214894f82~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622286&x-signature=k%2BWnyUdCJe71DyDlAp%2Bjf%2FYNyXk%3D","user_id":"4055421646541235","user_name":"大茗辅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4055421646541235","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545801469945973784","book_info":{"abstract":"别名：无限重生，我的主子是神仙
正文推迟到第二章！！！
【反重生、反系统、反穿越】
【多次换乘】
——一个关于傀儡成人再成傀儡的故事
温流月始终想不通：
为什么他天生就有横扫千军的能力？
为什么他的主人宋轻尘一眼就瞧上了出身奴隶的他？
为什么他的主人敢在大庭广众之下明晃晃地偏袒他？
为什么他的主人有预知未来的能力？
为什么他的主人会毫无保留地将自己的命脉，力量共享给他？
而自己为什么会心甘情愿为她效力？
他是谁？
宋轻尘又是谁？
这个世界又是怎么样的？
［金手多多的疯批女帝］X［天赋异禀的清冷美人］
主要就是在架空的古代背景下，奴隶出身的男主被女主看上，发现女主拥有无限重生的秘密后，就和她不断地重生重生再重生
 阅读指南： 1V1，男主视角，偏好女主视角的避雷，慢热

orwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":23067,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":41885,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":94},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1769435550,"author_reply_time":1769394271,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7596990278927778585","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星强推！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768815472,"group_id":"7545801469945973784","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1662877246690272"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545801469945973784","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4463,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8920,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7596991656814969625","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本反套路的古言重生文，从清冷男主的视角切入，把“傀儡成人再成傀儡”的宿命感写得扣人心弦。奴隶出身的温流月遇上手握无限重生挂的疯批女帝宋轻尘，从最初的困惑、试探到心甘情愿沉沦，两人在一次次重生里互相捆绑、彼此救赎，主仆之间的张力拉满。作者没有走常见的女强爽文路线，而是在架空古代的背景下，用慢节奏铺陈出宿命般的拉扯感。男主视角的细腻心理活动，让读者能共情他的迷茫与心动，而女主“疯批”外壳下的深情与脆弱，也在一次次重生的细节里逐渐浮现。1V1的设定干净利落，伏笔埋得自然，让人忍不住想跟着主角一起，揭开这个世界和重生的真相。","text_exts":[{"e":61,"s":57,"text":"无限重生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%97%A0%E9%99%90%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774071076D9F5781D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227596991656814969625%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227545801469945973784%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6
